title: calamagrostis stricta subsp. inexpansa
intro: Calamagrostis stricta subsp. inexpansa, also known as inland sloughgrass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis stricta subsp. inexpansa include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
